title: chouxia mollis
intro: Chouxia mollis is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Ochnaceae, and is commonly referred to as the "African blood root" due to its reddish-brown roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Chouxia mollis has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
